rings.name: ASSESS
rings.description: Explore with caution — not yet recommended.

rings.name: HOLD
rings.description: Avoid new projects — consider migrating away.

entries.title: Go
entries.description: Default language for backend services on the platform.

entries.title: Python
entries.description: Default for data, ML, and scripting services.

entries.title: Node.js
entries.description: Default for lightweight REST APIs and BFF services.

entries.title: TypeScript
entries.description: Required for all frontend and Node.js services.

entries.title: React
entries.description: Default frontend framework.

entries.title: Java / Spring
entries.description: No new services. Migrate to Go or Node.js.

entries.title: Ruby on Rails
entries.description: Legacy only. No new services.

entries.title: FastAPI
entries.description: Default Python API framework.

entries.title: AWS EKS
entries.description: Primary Kubernetes platform for all workloads.

entries.title: AWS ECR
entries.description: Container registry for all service images.

entries.title: RDS PostgreSQL
entries.description: Default relational database for services.

entries.title: AWS S3
entries.description: Default object storage — TechDocs, artefacts.

entries.title: Kind (local)
entries.description: Local Kubernetes cluster for development.

entries.title: AWS Lambda
entries.description: Use for async event processing and scheduled jobs.

entries.title: DynamoDB
entries.description: Evaluate for high-scale key-value workloads.

entries.title: Backstage
entries.description: Internal Developer Portal — service catalog, templates, TechDocs.

entries.title: ArgoCD
entries.description: GitOps continuous delivery — app-of-apps pattern.

entries.title: Helm
entries.description: Package manager for all Kubernetes deployments.

entries.title: Terraform
entries.description: IaC standard for all AWS infrastructure.

entries.title: Prometheus
entries.description: Metrics collection for all Kubernetes workloads.

entries.title: Grafana
entries.description: Default dashboarding and alerting platform.

entries.title: GitHub Actions
entries.description: CI/CD for all service pipelines.

entries.title: External Secrets Operator
entries.description: Syncs AWS Secrets Manager secrets into Kubernetes.

entries.title: Trivy
entries.description: Container image vulnerability scanner in CI.

entries.title: Tilt
entries.description: Hot-reload dev loop for local Kubernetes development. Auto-discovers services via helm-values-local.yaml.

entries.title: OpenTelemetry
entries.description: Vendor-neutral observability — traces + metrics.

entries.title: MLflow
entries.description: ML experiment tracking, model registry, and trace logging for AI agent services.

entries.title: Argo Workflows
entries.description: Kubernetes-native workflow engine for ML training jobs and batch pipelines.

entries.title: LangGraph
entries.description: Graph-based AI agent framework — golden path template for agentic services.

entries.title: Anthropic Claude API
entries.description: Managed LLM provider for AI agents — Claude Haiku for fast platform assistant tasks. Replaces local Ollama to avoid cluster memory constraints.

entries.title: OpenAI API
entries.description: Managed LLM provider for production AI agent services via LLM_API_KEY.

entries.title: Pulumi
entries.description: Evaluate as Terraform alternative for teams preferring code-first IaC.

entries.title: Argo Rollouts
entries.description: Progressive delivery on Kubernetes — canary and blue-green rollout strategies.

entries.title: OPA / Gatekeeper
entries.description: Admission controller that enforces platform policies defined as Rego rules.

entries.title: cert-manager
entries.description: Automated TLS certificate lifecycle for all Kubernetes ingress endpoints.

entries.title: Loki
entries.description: Log aggregation layer alongside Prometheus — query logs from Grafana.

entries.title: Falco
entries.description: Runtime security threat detection for Kubernetes workloads.

entries.title: SPIFFE / SPIRE
entries.description: Workload identity framework — evaluated in idp-platform M3 runtime security module.

entries.title: Cosign
entries.description: Container image signing and verification integrated into CI after Trivy scan.

entries.title: Chaos Mesh
entries.description: Kubernetes-native chaos engineering — inject faults to validate service resilience.

entries.title: nginx Ingress
entries.description: Default ingress controller for Kind local clusters and all golden-path service templates.

entries.title: Playwright
entries.description: E2E browser testing — used in e2e/ test suite and cloudnative-master workshop.

entries.title: Cypress
entries.description: Component and E2E testing for frontend services.

entries.title: Checkly
entries.description: Synthetic monitoring and API checks — __checks__/ deployed against production endpoints.

entries.title: Jest
entries.description: Unit and integration testing standard for all Node.js / TypeScript services.

entries.title: Appium
entries.description: Mobile automation framework — evaluate for mobile platform testing coverage.

entries.title: Selenium
entries.description: Legacy browser automation. Use Playwright or Cypress for new test suites.

entries.title: Pact
entries.description: Consumer-driven contract testing — evaluate for service API compatibility guarantees.

entries.title: Bitrise
entries.description: Mobile CI/CD platform — assess for iOS/Android build and test pipelines.

entries.title: Golden Paths
entries.description: Opinionated templates that pave the road for developers.

entries.title: GitOps
entries.description: Git as single source of truth for all deployments.

entries.title: 12-Factor App
entries.description: All services must follow 12-factor principles.

entries.title: DORA Metrics
entries.description: Deploy freq, lead time, CFR, MTTR — platform success KPIs.

entries.title: Policy as Code
entries.description: OPA/Gatekeeper to enforce platform conventions at admission.

entries.title: SLOs / Error Budgets
entries.description: Define reliability targets per service.

entries.title: Monorepo
entries.description: Avoid for new projects — prefer independent service repos.

entries.title: Agentic AI Services
entries.description: LangGraph + FastAPI pattern for deploying AI agents on the platform golden path.

entries.title: ML Golden Path
entries.description: Opinionated templates for ML training jobs, model serving APIs, and MLflow experiments.

entries.title: Prompt Engineering
entries.description: Structured prompt design for LLM-backed services — evaluate tooling (DSPy, PromptFlow).

entries.title: LambdaTest
entries.description: Cross-browser cloud testing grid — evaluate for Playwright/Cypress at scale.

entries.title: Xray (Jira)
entries.description: Test case management with Jira traceability — assess before adopting.

entries.title: Mailtrap
entries.description: Email sandbox for transactional email testing in CI and staging environments.
